Description:
Ballistics of the 3VBM3 APFSDS with projectile 3BM9 fired from the 125mm tank gun D-81T (2A26).

Charge consists of:
- 3BM10, projectile with additional charge of 3kg 15/1 V/A (High Nitration), with combustible casing.
- 4Zh40, with 3kg 15/1 V/A and 2 kg 12/7 V/A, with 0.45kg combustible casing of TNT-impregnated cardboard and metallic stub.
Charge mass is adjusted to 9.1 kg to approximate the contribution of combustible casings. 

The entry is fitted to generate 4400 kgf/cm² (with 4000 kgf/cm² as the design goal, and a 400 kgf/cm² exceedance of said) space-mean pressure with the 3VBM3 projectile, which yields the correct velocities for:
- 3VBM3 3BM10 3BM9   5.67 kg @ 1800 m/s - 1799 m/s
- 3VBM6 3BM13 3BM12  5.8 kg  @ 1800 m/s - 1790 m/s 
- 3VBM7 3BM16 3BM15  5.93 kg @ 1780 m/s - 1780 m/s 
- 3VBM8 3BM18 3BM17  6.1 kg  @ 1780 m/s - 1768 m/s
